About us

Built for the South African student.

Lumos Tutoring Academy (Pty) Ltd was founded in 2023. At Lumos, we believe that intelligence isn't measured by results, but by mindset. Our goal is to revolutionize learning by guiding students to cultivate the right mindset, boost their self-assurance, and sharpen their problem-solving abilities.

Lumos Tutoring Academy dreams of a South Africa where every student is equipped with the tools to excel academically and grow into a confident, critical thinker. We strive to bridge the gap between ability and achievement by delivering high-quality, personalized tutoring that prepares students for success both in their studies and in life.

✦

Conceptual clarity

We explain until the lightbulb goes on, not just until you've memorised.

◎

No one left behind

We pace every session around the student, not the tutor.

✶

IEB and CAPS focused

We know both curricula inside out and what examiners reward.

▷

Fully online

Join from anywhere — all you need is your phone or a laptop.

Getting started

How to start.

Joining Lumos takes less than 5 minutes. Here's how it works:

01

Fill in the form

Complete the online registration form with your details and subject needs.

02

Pay registration fee

A once-off R99 fee activates your Lumos account and secures your slot.

03

We confirm via WhatsApp

Our team reaches out within 24 hours to confirm your schedule and get you set up.

04

Start learning

Join your first session and experience what Lumos is all about.

Click below to complete your registration. Takes less than 3 minutes and we'll be in touch within 24 hours.

Frequently asked

Questions, answered.

We offer Mathematics, Mathematical Literacy, Physical Sciences, Life Sciences, Geography, Accounting, and Business Studies — for Grades 8 to 12 and Matric, covering both CAPS and IEB.
Sessions run for up to 1 hour 30 minutes. Your schedule is confirmed via WhatsApp after registration.
The monthly fee includes access to all subjects, live online sessions, learning materials, worksheets, baseline assessments, and recorded sessions you can rewatch at any time.
We have recorded sessions of all live classes, so students don't miss out on work. Students can watch the session at their own pace before the next class.
Absolutely — Matric exam prep is one of our strongest offerings. We focus on past papers, common exam pitfalls, and the specific techniques that examiners reward.
Yes — our students' results speak for themselves. Online sessions allow for flexible scheduling, recorded replays, and a comfortable learning environment. Many students actually perform better without the pressure of a physical classroom setting.
Payment details are shared via WhatsApp after your registration is confirmed. We accept EFT and other common South African payment methods.
Yes. You can cancel at any time by messaging us on WhatsApp. There are no long-term contracts — we earn your trust month by month.

Privacy Policy  ·  Terms and Conditions

Terms and Conditions

1. Introduction

These Terms and Conditions govern your use of tutoring services provided by Lumos Tutoring Academy (Pty) Ltd ("Lumos"). By registering, you agree to these terms in full.

2. Services

Lumos provides online tutoring for Grades 8–12 and Matric via Microsoft Teams, covering Mathematics, Mathematical Literacy, Physical Sciences, Life Sciences, Geography, Accounting, and Business Studies for CAPS and IEB.

3. Registration

A once-off R99 registration fee is payable on sign-up covering onboarding, profile setup, materials access, and slot activation. This fee is non-refundable.

4. Fees and Payment

  • Standard Plan: R499/month – all subjects
  • Family Special: R799/month – two students
  • One-on-One: R149/hour – one subject
  • Fees are due at the start of each month
  • Non-payment may result in service suspension

5. Cancellation

Subscriptions are month-to-month and may be cancelled anytime via WhatsApp or email. Cancellations take effect at the end of the current billing month.

6. No Refund Policy

All payments are final and non-refundable. No refunds will be issued for change of mind, absence, or early cancellation.

7. Student Conduct

Students must conduct themselves respectfully. Lumos reserves the right to terminate services without refund in cases of misconduct or harassment.

8. Intellectual Property

All materials provided by Lumos remain our intellectual property and may not be reproduced or shared without written consent.

9. Limitation of Liability

Lumos is not liable for failure to improve academic performance. Results depend on student effort and engagement.

10. Governing Law

These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of South Africa.

Last updated: 2025 · Lumos Tutoring Academy (Pty) Ltd

Privacy Policy

1. Introduction

Lumos Tutoring Academy (Pty) Ltd is committed to protecting your personal information in accordance with POPIA (Protection of Personal Information Act).

2. Information We Collect

  • Full name, grade, and curriculum (CAPS or IEB)
  • Phone number and email address
  • Payment information (we do not store card details)
  • Academic performance data for tutoring purposes
  • Session recordings for student reference

3. How We Use Your Information

  • To deliver and personalise tutoring services
  • To communicate schedules and materials via WhatsApp and email
  • To process payments and maintain billing records
  • To improve our curriculum and services

4. Sharing of Information

We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties except where required by law.

5. Data Security

We take reasonable measures to protect your personal information from unauthorised access or misuse.

6. Session Recordings

Microsoft Teams sessions may be recorded for students who miss class. Recordings are accessible only to enrolled students and Lumos staff.

7. Your Rights

Under POPIA, you have the right to access, correct, or request deletion of your data. Contact [email protected] to exercise these rights.

Last updated: 2025 · Lumos Tutoring Academy (Pty) Ltd

Tutor Terms and Conditions

1. Agreement

By joining Lumos as a tutor, you agree to these terms governing your relationship with Lumos Tutoring Academy (Pty) Ltd.

2. Responsibilities

  • Deliver curriculum-aligned sessions via Microsoft Teams
  • Prepare adequately and arrive on time for all sessions
  • Treat all students with respect and professionalism
  • Maintain session records and report student progress
  • Adhere to Lumos branding and teaching philosophy

3. Confidentiality

Tutors must maintain strict confidentiality of all student information and performance data. This obligation continues after termination of engagement.

4. Intellectual Property

All materials created for Lumos sessions remain the property of Lumos Tutoring Academy (Pty) Ltd and may not be used outside of Lumos without written consent.

5. Conduct

Professional conduct is required at all times. Discrimination, harassment, or inappropriate communication will result in immediate termination.

6. Remuneration

Tutor compensation is agreed upon separately in writing. Payment terms are per your individual agreement with Lumos management.

7. Termination

Either party may terminate with reasonable notice. Lumos may terminate immediately for misconduct or breach of these terms.

8. Governing Law

These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of South Africa.

Last updated: 2025 · Lumos Tutoring Academy (Pty) Ltd

Refund Policy

Our Refund Policy

Lumos Tutoring Academy (Pty) Ltd operates a strict no-refund policy. By completing any payment, you acknowledge and agree to this policy.

No Refunds After Payment

All fees paid to Lumos are final and non-refundable, including:

  • Once-off R99 registration fee
  • Monthly subscription fees (Standard and Family Plans)
  • One-on-One session fees

Missed Sessions

No refund or credit is issued for missed sessions. All live sessions are recorded and made available so no learning is lost.

Cancellation

You may cancel anytime via WhatsApp or email. Cancellations take effect at the end of the current billing month. No partial refunds for unused days.

Service Interruption by Lumos

If Lumos cancels a session, we will provide a replacement session or recorded material. Refunds are considered only at management's sole discretion in cases of extended service failure.

Contact Us

Questions? Reach us at [email protected] or WhatsApp 078 186 1196.

Last updated: 2025 · Lumos Tutoring Academy (Pty) Ltd
